info.description: An ordered product line inside a curated collection. Expands into a normal Medusa cart line at add-to-cart time.

OriginalProduct.description: Optional item the customer expected before this substituted item replaced it.

OriginalProductName.description: Fallback customer-facing original item name when no OriginalProduct relation is available.

OriginalQuantity.description: Quantity of the original item this line replaces. Used to compare value and weight impact.

SubstitutionValuePolicy.description: Private/editorial policy for whether the replacement value is acceptable.

ShippingCostRisk.description: Private business guardrail. Use review values for replacements that materially change cold-chain weight, bulk, or margin.

RequiresBusinessReview.description: Internal guardrail for substitutions that could change shipping cost or bundle economics.

SubstitutionNote.description: Customer-facing explanation of what changed and why.

ProductHandle.description: Fallback storefront handle. Seed scripts populate this from the related product.

Role.description: Customer-facing reason this item belongs in the collection, e.g. anchor, protein, side, heritage marker.

Notes.description: Internal/editor notes. Do not render to customers.
